---
title: "FRESH Insights"
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
    - "!resources/index.qmd"
    # Archived — live at their URLs, listed on /archive.qmd instead of here:
    - "!same-bread-five-verdicts/index.qmd"   # superseded by meta-nps-five-verdicts (Part 1)
    - "!tool-healthfulness-map/index.qmd"      # "When Experts Disagree, Where Do You Look First?"
  template: _listing-cards.ejs.md
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, reading-time, categories, fresh-engines, topics, series, part, card-subtitle, companion]
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
page-layout: full
---

::: {.fi-standfirst}
Most tools hand you an evidence map and stop. **FRESH** traces a claim from what's
in the food, through what the science actually shows once it's audited, to what it
means for you, and shows the uncertainty at every step. These essays are where that
work goes public.
:::
